_comment: Ingestion sources. google_news: Google News RSS search queries (no account needed, 'when:1d' = last 24h). rss: standard RSS/Atom feeds. google_alerts: optional Google Alerts RSS feed URLs.

google_news.q: "AI agents" (government OR "public sector" OR ministry) when:1d
government ("artificial intelligence" OR AI) (launch OR pilot OR deploy) when:1d
"intelligence artificielle" (gouvernement OR "service public" OR administration) when:1d
"inteligencia artificial" (gobierno OR "sector público" OR administración) when:1d
"künstliche Intelligenz" (Regierung OR Verwaltung OR Behörde) when:1d
